description: Configure a new Tracked Entity Attribute named 'National PUI' (Short name: 'Nat PUI') for the 'Person' entity type in the DHIS2 Tracker. Set the Value Type to 'Text', enable 'Unique', and configure a Pattern (Regex) to enforce the format of two uppercase letters, a forward slash, and six digits (e.g., 'BO/123456'). Assign this attribute to the 'Person' tracked entity type and ensure 'Display in list' is enabled in the assignment settings.
